children.text: The Secretary concerned, without regard to , may make agreements or other arrangements for the training of members of the uniformed services under the jurisdiction of that Secretary by, in, or through non-Government facilities.section 6101 of title 41

children.label: A
children.text: The government of a State or of a territory or possession of the United States, including the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, an interstate governmental organization, and a unit, subdivision, or instrumentality of any of the foregoing.

children.label: B
children.text: A foreign government or international organization, or instrumentality of either, which is designated by the President as eligible to provide training under this section.

children.label: C
children.text: A medical, scientific, technical, educational, research, or professional institution, foundation, or organization.

children.label: D
children.text: A business, commercial, or industrial firm, corporation, partnership, proprietorship, or other organization.

children.label: E
children.text: Individuals other than civilian or military personnel of the Government.

children.label: F
children.text: The services and property of any of the foregoing providing the training.
pay all or a part of the pay of a member of a uniformed service who is selected and assigned for training under this section, for the period of training; and

children.label: A
children.text: Travel and per diem instead of subsistence under sections 405 and 452 of title 37 and the Joint Travel Regulations for the Uniformed Services.

children.label: B
children.text: Transportation of immediate family, household goods and personal effects, packing, crating, temporarily storing, draying, and unpacking under sections 452 and 453(c) of title 37 and the Joint Travel Regulations for the Uniformed Services when the estimated costs of transportation and related services are less than the estimated aggregate per diem payments for the period of training.

children.label: E
children.text: Purchase or rental of books, materials, and supplies.

children.label: F
children.text: Other services or facilities directly related to the training of the member.

children.heading: .—Certain Expenses Excluded
children.label: c .—Certain Expenses Excluded
children.text: The expenses of training do not include membership fees except to the extent that the fee is a necessary cost directly related to the training itself or that payment of the fee is a condition precedent to undergoing the training.
